title: MLX Embeddings Model Spec
description: MLX model specification for embedding vector generation on Apple Silicon.
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies an MLX-format embedding model for producing dense text representations on Apple Silicon. This enables fast, energy-efficient embedding generation without the overhead of a GGUF runtime.

## When to use
Use this type when wiring an embedding cap that targets the MLX backend on Apple Silicon. The default points to a 4-bit MiniLM-L6-v2 model from mlx-community, suitable for general-purpose text similarity tasks.

## Notes
MLX embedding models follow the same directory layout as MLX LLM models. Pair with [Embedding Chunk Size](https://capdag.com/browse/media:embedding-chunk-size;search;limit;operator;task;textable;numeric) and [Embedding Chunk Overlap](https://capdag.com/browse/media:embedding-chunk-overlap;search;limit;operator;task;textable;numeric) parameters to control chunking.
